title: Ethics Committees
content:
Ethics Committees

Non-Interventional Research Ethics Committee

All non-pharmaceutical observational studies, questionnaires, interviews, focus group studies, retrospective archive searches, research, cell or tissue culture studies to be conducted with collection material such as blood, urine, tissue, genetic material, EEG or radiological images or material obtained during routine examination, examination and treatment procedures, research that does not require the direct intervention of a physician, such as gene therapy research (not involving treatment), research involving nursing activities, dietary studies with food additives, research on body physiology such as exercise, anthropometric measurement studies and evaluation of living habits.

Click here for

.

for online application

.

Clinical Research Ethics Committee

Our Clinical Research Ethics Committee evaluates the applications to be made from within and outside our University from scientific and ethical perspectives in accordance with the Regulation on Clinical Research published by the Ministry of Health, Turkish Medicines and Medical Devices Agency.

Click here

to access the Board page

.

Animal Research Ethics Committee

Any in vivo or in vitro project and/or study involving scientific research on experimental animals must apply to this committee. Applications of projects without board approval are not accepted.

to access the board page

.
